text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp, and the sun is
unrelenting. This year looks to be the hottest on
record.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Damn... What's up with this heat?
choice_data_list: Be sure to drink plenty of water.
Be sure to drink plenty of water.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I know... Pant.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Are you sure, President Rudolf?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I heard you guys were having a hard time
making progress. I would offer my support, if you
would have it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yippeee! I'm so happy! We're gonna learn so
much from you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But what about your own training?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry. It's helpful for me to see others run
as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but I have something of a secret
plan.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! Even after changing clothes, I still feel
gross...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, Brian. Here you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Rudolf? If it's paperwork you've got, I don't
want it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Cutting straight to the chase, I see. Don't
worry. I did not bring you to the student council
to tie you to a desk.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I expect you to show me a future I'm incapable of
creating myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Let me cut to the chase as well. Do
you have time to run a scrimmage with me
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ha... Not at all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'd be happy to accept. It's okay, right? Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haha! There's no way I'd let this opportunity pass
me by! I'm goi—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Nothing. I'm going to get started on my
afternoon training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you handle the details for me? Just
tell me what you end up deciding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I see she's as self-centered as ever. You
seem to be getting pushed around quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I suppose you're right.

And so, after arranging the details of the
scrimmage with Symboli Rudolf, I rush over to
Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ughhh...
Narita Brian is lying passed out on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nnngh... Where...

text_block_list.name: Medical Staff
text_block_list.text: Trainer! She's regained consciousness!

text_block_list.name: Medical Staff
text_block_list.text:
You're not well... You're suffering from summer
heat fatigue and mild heat stroke.

text_block_list.name: Medical Staff
text_block_list.text:
Please avoid any strenuous activity for the time
being. It would be dangerous to overexert
yourself in this condition.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But, I have a scrimmage tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You want to call it off because of something so
minor?! You're underestimating me!
choice_data_list: Be that as it may, I'm worried about your health.
Be that as it may, I'm worried about your health.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You've got to be joking!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're worrying too much! Don't take this away
from me!
choice_data_list: I'm telling you this because I don't want to take it away!
I'm telling you this because I don't want to take it away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

A race between Umamusume is the epitome of
extreme speed. Such exertion puts an immense
amount of strain on their legs.

Moreover, Narita Brian is the type of runner who
will run as hard as she can, regardless of the
circumstances. If she were to collapse in her
current state...
choice_data_list: As your trainer, this is non-negotiable.
As your trainer, this is non-negotiable.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch! With this kind of trainer—

I hurry to support her as she crumples to her
knees.
Her body lacks any strength whatsoever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just stop, okay? I get it already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry for losing it like that. I didn't mean to
worry you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heat stroke?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand completely. Brian, don't worry about
the scrimmage, or anything else for that matter. I
will find someone else.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't work yourself up over this. Just get some
rest. Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't apologize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It was my fault. I did it to myself.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Oguri!
You're amazing, President!
Clang!

The back-and-forth between the two racers is
breathtaking. Even if it's just a scrimmage, the
race between two first-class runners captures
everyone's attention.
Narita Brian, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So I just get to watch through the window, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What a rip-off...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't... I don't need your sympathy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's my own carelessness that got me here. It's
totally on me for blowing the chance I'd been
waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We've got to rebuild me from the foundation up
to prevent this from ever happening again.

Just to be safe, she gets a comprehensive
physical later. The tests reveal no abnormalities.

She resumes training the next day with a whole
new regimen, vowing never to make the same
mistake again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's so ridiculous being defeated by the heat. Do I
not have enough guts or something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It sucks not being able to run!

After that, Narita Brian doesn't take her eyes off
the race.

Just to be safe, she gets a comprehensive
physical later. The tests reveal no abnormalities.

But her eyes reflect a summer of lingering regret
and frustration.
